name: Ginger Crumb Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
Place a rack in the middle of the oven.
2. In a food processor, process the gingersnap crumbs, crystallized ginger, sugar, and ground ginger until finely combined. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and stir in the melted butter. Set aside about one-fourth cup of the crumb mixture for decorating the top of the pie.
3. Press the remaining crumb mixture evenly over the bottom and up the sides of a greased 9-inch deep pie pan (or an 8-inch springform pan for a neater appearance). Bake the crust for 10 minutes alongside the decoration in a separate pan or sheet of foil. If needed, crumble any extra crumbs before assembly.
Makes one deep 9-inch pie shell or eight-inch springform crust.
